channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: A Common ADHD Med Might Not Raise Psychosis Risk After All
item.description: Researchers in the UK found no evidence that methylphenidate, the active ingredient in Ritalin, increases children's odds of later developing schizophrenia.

item.title: Watch a Creepy as Hell Clip From the Excellent Game Adaptation ‘Exit 8’ (Exclusive)
item.description: Watch the clip and read an interview with the film's director, Genki Kawamura.

item.title: You can install these wireless security cameras over half a mile away
item.description: First announced earlier this year at CES 2026, Xthings is planning to release two new long-range wireless security camera kits sometime in the second quarter of this year, with pricing ranging from $489.99 to $989.99 depending on the number and types of cameras included. The cameras will use the Wi-Fi HaLow (802.11ah) protocol to wirelessly […]

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Thursday, March 26 (game #1522)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Thursday, March 26 (game #1019)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Thursday, March 26 (game #753)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: OpenAI Enters Its Focus Era by Killing Sora
item.description: As the ChatGPT-maker eyes an IPO, it's ditching Sora in favor of a unified AI assistant and enterprise coding tools.

item.title: Steam ajoute une nouveauté pour vous inciter à jouer à vos jeux « non Steam »
item.description: L'application Steam fait un pas de plus pour devenir un véritable agrégateur de jeux vidéo. Pas de quoi détrôner GOG Galaxy pour autant.

item.title: Forget wearable AI – the future of AI is contextual
item.description: AI is changing the how everyday people and businesses interact with software.

item.title: Granola raises $125M, hits $1.5B valuation as it expands from meeting notetaker to enterprise AI app
item.description: Granola's valuation jumped from $250 million to $1.5 billion with this round, and it has added more support for AI agents after users previously complained.

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg, Jensen Huang and Sergey Brin join Trump's tech advisory panel
item.description: The leaders of several major tech companies will offer the White House their opinions on tech and science policy as part of an advisory council. Mark Zuckerberg, Jensen Huang, Michael Dell and Larry Ellison — the CEOs of Meta, NVIDIA, Dell and Oracle, respectively — are joining the panel alongside Google co-founder Sergey Brin and AMD CEO Lisa Su. Venture capitalist Marc Andreessen, who has donated to super PACs that support President Donald Trump, will serve on the panel too.The latest iteration of the President’s Council of Advisors on Science and Technology (PCAST) has 13 members, though th...

item.title: Quelles sont les meilleures voitures électriques pas chère disponibles ?
item.description: Vous êtes à la recherche d'une voiture électrique pas chère ? Grâce au bonus écologique, mais aussi à nos tests sur Frandroid, vous pourrez trouver une voiture électrique pas chère à moins de 25 000 euros.

item.title: Meta launches new initiative to support entrepreneurship, drive AI adoption
item.description: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg said in a memo to staff that small businesses have always been a big part of the company's business model, and that while tens of millions of entrepreneurs already use its platforms to grow and connect with customers, the company wants to do more in the space.

item.title: Moins de 13 kg : on a vu l’EMQ, un nouveau vélo électrique pliant qui défie Decathlon et Brompton avec de beaux arguments
item.description: Avec son poids inférieur à 13 kg, l’EMQ se démarque du marché et propose même une largeur minimale, avec de petites concessions mais aussi quelques bons atouts comme la transmission auto.

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg and Jensen Huang are part of Trump’s new ‘tech panel’
item.description: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg, Oracle CEO Larry Ellison, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang, and Google cofounder Sergey Brin will be the first four members of the President's Council of Advisors on Science and Technology (PCAST), according to the Wall Street Journal. The panel, which will "weigh in on AI policy," will include 13 members to start, […]

item.title: Ring just launched a battery-powered version of its premium 4K video doorbell, so you can install it 'virtually anywhere' with no wires
item.description: Ring just released a new premium 4K video doorbell, alongside three more 2K alternatives — here's everything you need to know.

item.title: Amazon’s Big Spring Sale 2026: all of the latest deals
item.description: If you’re looking for the best time to get a deal this spring, it might very well be during Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, which is happening now through 2:59AM ET on April 1st. We’re highlighting the best that the sale has to offer, including the many so-called “doorbuster” deals that will appear throughout the seasonal […]

item.title: Cinq ans après avoir racheté l’activité casques et écouteurs de Sennheiser, Sonova veut déjà la revendre
item.description: Qui veut racheter l'activité audio grand public de Sennheiser ? Sonova, qui l'avait rachetée il y a cinq ans, est confronté à des difficultés sur ce segment du marché ; la vente des casques et écouteurs haut de gamme de la marque pourrait l'aider à redresser la barre.

item.title: Stephen Colbert is writing a new Lord of the Rings movie
item.description: It’s been quite a while since we visited Middle-Earth on the big screen (anime prequels aside), but it looks like Lord of the Rings fans have plenty to look forward to in the coming years. We already knew that Andy Serkis’ The Hunt for Gollum was in the works — and by all accounts is progressing nicely — but another Rings-related film is in development too, and it’s being co-written by none other than Stephen Colbert. The announcement came from Peter Jackson himself, in a video posted by Warner Bros. to coincide with Tolkien Reading Day. The director of the Lord of the Rings trilogy provided a...

item.title: macOS 26.4 vous dira si votre MacBook charge trop lentement
item.description: Parmi les nouveautés de macOS 26.4 Tahoe, on note l'apparition d'une nouvelle mention pratique pour savoir si la recharge de son MacBook est adaptée ou non.

item.title: Anthropic releases safer Claude Code 'auto mode' to avoid mass file deletions and other AI snafus
item.description: Anthropic has begun previewing "auto mode" inside of Claude Code. The company describes the new feature as a middle path between the app's default behavior, which sees Claude request approval for every file write and bash command, and the "dangerously-skip-premissions" command some coders use to make the chatbot function more autonomously. With auto mode enabled, a classifier system guides Claude, giving it permission to carry out actions it deems safe, while redirecting the chatbot to take a different approach when it determines Claude might do something risky. In designing the system, Anthro...

item.title: Bouygues Telecom : certains forfaits mobiles vont inclure des frais de résiliation, voici quand
item.description: Après les forfaits B&You, c'est au tour des forfaits mobiles Bouygues Telecom sans engagement d'intégrer des frais de résiliation pour tous les abonnés.

item.title: Windows 11 aurait pu être un succès dès le début si Microsoft n’avait pas annulé ce projet
item.description: Face aux critiques persistantes sur le manque d’optimisation de Windows 11, Microsoft change enfin de fusil d’épaule. La firme de Redmond a ainsi promis une cure d’amaigrissement radicale pour Windows 11. D’ici à la fin de l’année, le système d’exploitation de Microsoft sera moins gourmand en RAM, et l’espace disque occupé par l’OS sera optimisé. Un projet d'optimisation que la firme de Redmond avait déjà entamé dans le passé, sans jamais aller jusqu'au bout....

item.title: Arbor Energy just landed a billion-dollar order to bring rocket turbine tech to the power grid
item.description: The large deal sees Arbor delivering as many as 200 of its Halcyon turbines, which can burn either natural gas or waste biomass.

item.title: Meta turns to AI to make shopping easier on Instagram and Facebook
item.description: Meta is using generative AI to provide more product and brand information to consumers when they're shopping in its apps.

item.title: Sony and Honda give up on their joint EV project
item.description: The Sony-Honda joint venture has killed plans for its Afeela sedan and SUV electric vehicles. The news comes shortly after Honda reversed its plans to launch more electric vehicles in the U.S.

item.title: Ring finally brings 4K video to its battery-powered doorbell camera
item.description: Ring has announced its first battery-powered 2K and 4K doorbell cameras. The Ring Battery Video Doorbell Pro 2nd Gen ($249.99) offers 4K video resolution and 10x digital zoom, while the Battery Video Doorbell Plus 2nd Gen ($179.99) offers 2K video and 6x zoom. The Battery Video Doorbell 2nd Gen ($99.99) also has 2K but uses […]

item.title: Meta has a new boss to help 'encourage' its workers to use more AI
item.description: Meta wants all 78,000 of its workers to use AI at work, despite rumors of huge potential layoffs.

item.title: Keychron’s mechanical keyboards are up to 60 percent off
item.description: Keychron makes some of the best mechanical keyboards available, whether you’re something of an enthusiast who intends to hotswap switches or someone who doesn’t want to pay a lot to get a well-built clickity, clackity board. Thankfully, Keychron, Walmart, and Amazon are all discounting a swath of Keychron keyboards through March 31st as part of […]

item.title: JBL Authentics 200 : cette enceinte Bluetooth résidentielle notée 9/10 s’allège de 100 €
item.description: Stylée et offrant un son très équilibré et puissant, la JBL Authentics 200 est une enceinte Bluetooth qui nous a réellement convaincus. Actuellement, plusieurs e-marchands la proposent à 199,99 euros au lieu de 299,99 euros.

item.title: Brandon Sanderson’s ‘Magic: The Gathering’ Novella Is Back—at a Hefty Price
item.description: Eight years after it was first released for free online, 'Children of the Nameless' is getting a print edition... for a wild price.

item.title: How to watch MLB 2026: live streams, cheap Major League Baseball broadcasts, season schedule
item.description: All the ways to watch MLB 2026 live streams online from anywhere, as the Dodgers go for a World Series threepeat in potentially baseball's biggest season yet.

item.title: Jo Nesbø isn't the next 'Harlan Coben of Netflix' according to the crime writer himself — and he's 'not even thought about' Detective Hole season 2
item.description: Don't expect lots of Jo Nesbø adaptations on Netflix after Detective Hole — unlike the Harlan Coben collection, Nesbø hasn't given his TV future a 'second thought'.

item.title: I compared the Samsung Galaxy A57 to the Galaxy S26, and it already looks like an excellent budget option
item.description: We did a quick side-by-side comparison of the new Galaxy A57 and Galaxy S26, and the results surprised us.

item.title: Writer wants to be the go-to AI tool kit for the enterprise
item.description: With customizable ‘skills’ and step-by-step ‘playbooks,’ the company aims to help employees automate workflows without touching code. As companies continue to seek ways to harness artificial intelligence for concrete productivity gains, a company called Writer offers AI tools specifically geared toward getting things done at the enterprise level.

item.title: Quelles sont les meilleures trottinettes électriques en 2026 ?
item.description: Les trottinettes électriques sont partout dans nos villes. Seulement voilà, le marché est saturé de références qui s'adressent à différentes personnes. Quelles sont les meilleures trottinettes électriques ? Voici notre comparatif.

item.title: Apple’s iOS 26.4 update adds age verification in the UK
item.description: Apple now requires users in the UK to verify their age with the launch of iOS 26.4. In a support page on Apple's website, the company says users must confirm that they're over 18 to "use certain services or features, or take certain actions on their account." UK users can confirm their age by scanning […]

item.title: 'AI will also present new threats to society' — Sam Altman issues stark warning as $1 billion plan is revealed
item.description: Sam Altman says AI could help cure diseases — but warns it will also create serious new threats that no single company can control.

item.title: Iran receives a U.S. ceasefire plan, as more Marines are sent to the Gulf region
item.description: Tehran dismissed the diplomatic effort while continuing strikes on Israel and Kuwait. Iran has received an American plan to pause the war in the Middle East, officials said Wednesday — a proposal sent even as Washington deploys paratroopers and more Marines to the region.Tehran did not confirm receiving the plan and publicly dismissed the diplomatic effort while launching more attacks on Israel and Gulf Arab countries, including an assault that sparked a huge fire at Kuwait International Airport. Iran also continued to come under attack.Two officials from Pakistan, which delivered the plan to ...

item.title: The Great Salt Lake Is Hiding Something Big, Study Suggests
item.description: Scientists uncovered a deep reservoir of freshwater coming in from beneath the saline playa.

item.title: Dofus : suite à l’exploitation d’une faille par des hackers, Ankama décide de rollback 3 semaines en arrière pour tous les joueurs
item.description: Tous les joueurs du jeu de rôle en ligne Dofus Rétro vont revenir à l'état dans lequel ils étaient il y a 3 semaines. La faute aux pirates.

item.title: Singapore’s JTC expands LaunchPad startups’ access to 19 cities
item.description: LaunchPad startups can access co-working spaces worldwide, including hubs in Jakarta and San Francisco.

item.title: Elon Musk pauses changes to X’s creator revenue-sharing program after backlash
item.description: Hours after announcement of the new policy Elon Musk said X is pausing the rollout.

item.title: Celebrate Apple's 50th anniversary by boosting your Mac mini's capacity with Acer's secret weapon — M4 Dock SSD Enclosure & Stand is $64 in Amazon's Big Spring Sale
item.description: Boost your Apple Mac mini's capacity — Acer's M4 Dock SSD Enclosure & Stand is 20% off for Amazon's Big Spring Sale.

item.title: Apple impose la vérification d’âge sur iPhone au Royaume-Uni, bientôt partout ailleurs dans le monde ?
item.description: Le Royaume-Uni est le premier pays européen où Apple demande aux utilisateurs de vérifier leur âge. Si l'utilisateur s'y refuse ou s'il est mineur, des protections seront mises en place automatiquement sur l'iPhone.

item.title: New Bernie Sanders AI Safety Bill Would Halt Data Center Construction
item.description: The US senator said on Tuesday that a moratorium would give lawmakers time to "ensure that AI is safe." Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez will introduce a similar bill in the House in the weeks ahead.

item.title: HackerOne says employees hit by data breach - and Navia hack is to blame
item.description: Earlier attack on Navia trickled down to affect HackerOne employees too.

item.title: Amazon just dropped the Apple iPad Air to its lowest-ever price — save $199 during the spring sale
item.description: As of March 25, the Mashable-tested Apple iPad Air 11-inch is down to $549.99 on Amazon, a 27% discount for the Big Spring Sale.

item.title: Apple TV drops ominous teaser for comedy horror show Widow's Bay — and the Twin Peaks vibes have already got me hooked
item.description: Widow's Bay is a new horror comedy series for Apple TV, and its first teaser is wonderfully unsettling.

item.title: Le MacBook Neo confirme que les iPhone 17 sont d’excellents smartphones gaming
item.description: Le MacBook Neo a une puce mobile, mais elle est très puissante, suffisamment pour faire fonctionner de gros jeux AAA dans de bonnes conditions.

item.title: First victory over Big Tech by a U.S. state in court: Meta to pay big money for exposing children to sexual exploitation
item.description: A New Mexico jury ordered a $375 million penalty for misleading the public and fostering adverse mental health, among other things. Meta must—quite literally—pay for endangering children across its platforms.

item.title: ‘Jumanji 3’ Is Moving Out of the Way of ‘Avengers: Doomsday’ and ‘Dune: Part Three’
item.description: Plus, Vincent D'Onofrio gets into character to explain why the Punisher isn't in 'Daredevil: Born Again' season 2.

item.title: 136 cœurs, 3 nm… Arm dévoile une première puce bien à lui, et elle dépote
item.description: Fabriquée en partenariat avec Meta, la toute première puce signée Arm, habituellement « simple » vendeur de propriété intellectuelle, se dévoile cette semaine. Ses 136 cœurs et sa gravure en 3 nm seront mis au service de l'IA agentique.
